key_alerts: CRITICAL — Haaland UNAVAILABLE (zero points): Confirmed not in Man City's GW38 squad. Bench asset scores zero. Do NOT activate TC chip.

CRITICAL — Raya NOT IN SQUAD: Arsenal rotated their entire XI post-title with CL final pending. Raya omitted from matchday squad entirely. Zero points from the GK slot. Auto-sub trigger: Sels (bench GK) is Forest's confirmed #1 and should auto-sub in — clean sheet opportunity vs Bournemouth.

CRITICAL — Aina RULED OUT: Vitor Pereira confirmed no risks with half-fit players for the season finale. Aina did not make the Forest matchday squad despite returning to pitch work Thursday. Auto-sub chain: Munoz (CRY DEF, confirmed starting) is the natural DEF replacement.

CRITICAL — Gabriel DOUBTFUL + BENCHED: Double jeopardy. squad.json marks him DOUBTFUL; confirmed GW38 reports place him on the Arsenal bench as Arteta kept only two GW37 survivors. Did not start. Treat as non-contributor.
HIGH — Gvardiol BENCHED: Man City dead rubber — confirmed on the bench for GW38. No clean sheet upside, minimal attacking returns. City rotated heavily with season settled.

HIGH — Rogers ROTATION RISK: Aston Villa won the Europa League final days before GW38. Emery hinted at managing minutes for the trip to Man City. Rogers not guaranteed to start — eight changes confirmed across Villa's squad for the fixture.

NAILED — Bowen (captain, WHU): West Ham relegation decider vs Leeds. Full-strength guaranteed. Captain pick validated by multiple sources. Over 134,000 FPL managers transferred him in for GW38. Correct armband holder.
NAILED — M.Salah (vice-captain, LIV): Confirmed starter for his Liverpool farewell match. Emotional and competitive motivation confirmed. Vice-captain designation fully validated.

NAILED — Mbeumo (MUN, squad tag BRE is stale): NOTE — Mbeumo transferred from Brentford to Manchester United mid-season in a £71m deal. The squad.json team field 'BRE' is stale data from original purchase. In GW38 he plays for MUN. Mbeumo nailed to start.
NAILED — Anderson + Wood + Sels (NFO): All three in Forest's confirmed GW38 XI vs Bournemouth despite mild Forest rotation concerns.
NAILED — Mateta + Munoz (CRY): Both in Crystal Palace's confirmed GW38 XI. Palace playing with pride post-Conference League win.
DATA NOTE — All xpts.json values show xpts=0 and fdr=3 across every player. Model output is flat for GW38 — news signal is the sole differentiation layer this gameweek.

FINAL DAY STRUCTURAL WARNING: GW38 is historically the highest-rotation gameweek of the season. This squad has 4 confirmed starters who are absent or benched (Raya, Aina, Gabriel, Gvardiol) and 1 more (Rogers) at serious rotation risk. Auto-sub chain is critical — Sels and Munoz both appear to cover two of the three holes cleanly.
raw_notes: Research basis: Fantasy Football Scout confirmed 'City + Arsenal rotate, Salah starts' for GW38 team news. Arsenal kept only two GW37 survivors; Raya not even in squad. Gvardiol confirmed on City bench. Rogers flagged after Emery rotated eight players post-Europa League final. Aina ruled out by Pereira explicit confirmation. Bowen flagged as minimal rotation risk — WHU in must-win relegation battle vs Leeds. Salah confirmed starter for Liverpool vs Aston Villa. Mbeumo is a Manchester United player since mid-season (£71m transfer from Brentford); squad.json 'BRE' tag is legacy data. Crystal Palace (Mateta, Munoz) confirmed starters. Forest's Anderson and Wood in predicted XI despite Pereira hint at relaxation. Kluivert noted as bench-usage risk for Bournemouth — medium confidence on a start. xpts.json flat (all 0) — news desk signals are the only live information for GW38 decision-making.

player_news.name: Haaland

player_news.name: Raya
player_news.notes: Arsenal rotated entire XI for GW38 dead rubber ahead of CL final. Arteta kept only two players from GW37. Raya was omitted from the matchday squad entirely. Zero minutes, zero points. Auto-sub: Sels (bench GK) is Forest's starting GK vs Bournemouth — auto-sub activates cleanly.

player_news.name: Aina
player_news.notes: Returned to pitch work Thursday but Vitor Pereira confirmed he would not be risked in the season finale. Did not make the squad. Auto-sub: Munoz (CRY, DEF, confirmed starting) covers the vacant DEF slot.

player_news.name: Gabriel
player_news.notes: Double jeopardy: DOUBTFUL in squad.json (chance=0 in news.json) and Arsenal's mass GW38 rotation placed him on the bench with Saka, Gyokeres and Eze. Did not start. Treat as non-contributor.

player_news.name: Gvardiol
player_news.notes: Man City dead rubber with season position settled. Gvardiol confirmed among substitutes for GW38. No clean sheet upside from this slot.

player_news.name: Munoz
player_news.notes: Bench DEF. Confirmed in Crystal Palace's GW38 XI. With Aina ruled out, Munoz auto-subs into the starting XI as a DEF. Auto-sub chain works cleanly.

player_news.notes: Bench MID. Bournemouth had motivation for a strong finish but Kluivert has come off the bench in recent fixtures. Medium confidence on a start — may start from the bench for Bournemouth. Bench-only so no direct XI impact unless auto-sub chain reaches him.
